asset_name: Feed Station Set — food bowl states plus water bowl
shared_properties: Left floor placement aligns with room shell anchors.
PICO-8 readable 1px outlines and flat fills.
Food and water props stay small so Echo keeps visual priority.
differences: This file covers bowl prop states and interaction cues.
Cleanup dirt markers stay outside this task.

context.usage: Food bowl communicates hunger state and water bowl stabilizes the care corner layout.

layout_notes: Food bowl occupies x=0..15 and water bowl occupies x=20..31 inside each state frame.
Food bowl interior uses 7 to 8 seed pixels in food_full, 3 to 4 seed pixels in food_low, and 0 seed pixels in food_empty.
Water bowl stays static with pale fill so state changes stay focused on the food bowl.

shape.silhouette: 36x12 twin-bowl prop with a left seed bowl, a 4px gap, and a right water bowl in one shallow horizontal profile.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 108x12px with three 36x12 states and no padding.
Food bowl reads clearly at 1x scale in all three states and keeps the water bowl readable beside it.
Food bowl center aligns to x=24 y=106 when placed in scene, matching the room shell anchor area.
Only listed colors and transparency are used.
